certificate.module_name: HID Global ActivID Applet 2.7.7 & 2.7.8 on Thales IDCore 3230 Platform
certificate.description: HID Global ActivID Applet 2.7.7 & 2.7.8 on Thales IDCore 3230 Platform cryptographic module, validated to FIPS 140-3 overall Level 2, is a single-chip “contact and contactless” module implementing the Global Platform operational environment, with Card Manager as well as the ActivID Applet Suite.
